page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache, with support for AVX and AVX-512 instructions. The instance is equipped with 186.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes bundled hardware acceleration consisting of two NVIDIA T4 GPUs from the Turing architecture, delivering a combined total of 32 GB of VRAM. There is no local storage included with this instance, meaning storage must be provisioned externally. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 15 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is weak, falling into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression is poor. However, multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression both achieve average ratings. Memory bandwidth is also average, with read-only large block speeds at 98.26 GB/sec and write speeds at 44.08 GB/sec. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a balanced mid-range GPU-to-CPU resource density, making it a viable option for parallelized workloads that can leverage the dual NVIDIA T4 GPUs rather than relying on high single-core CPU performance.

Given the dual NVIDIA T4 GPUs and 48 dedicated cores, the ecs.gn6i-c24g1.12xlarge is suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallelized data processing. It is also appropriate for multi-threaded applications, Redis caching, and static web serving, though it is less suitable for single-threaded tasks or workloads requiring high local storage performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores on the x86_64 architecture, running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 186.0 GB of system memory and two NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing 32 GB of total VRAM, while local storage is absent. Network performance is supported by a 15 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmarks reveal weak single-core CPU performance and poor single-threaded compression, but average multi-core capabilities, multi-threaded decompression, and memory bandwidth. Qualitatively, the instance offers a cost-effective entry point for multi-GPU workloads where massive single-thread CPU performance is not critical. It is best suited for machine learning inference, video transcoding, parallel data processing, and multi-threaded web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 48 Intel Xeon cores, 186 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA T4 GPUs, designed for parallel processing and machine learning inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon cores, 186 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA T4 GPUs for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 48-core server featuring dual NVIDIA T4 GPUs and 186 GB RAM for parallelized compute and machine learning workloads.

Dual NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing 32 GB of total VRAM
186.0 GB of system memory and 15 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage included, requiring external volume attachment
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Suited for machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallel processing
